ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPS device installed in the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS device */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the GPS device is installed in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the GPS reading */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the vehicle */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic reading */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of traffic */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of traffic */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Occupancy of the road */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the weather data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the route is for */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the route */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the route */,
  "route" TEXT /* Optimized route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time of the route */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization data point */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the optimization data is for */,
  "utility" REAL /* Utility of the route */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the route */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the route */,
  "eta" REAL /* Eta value of the route */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value of the route */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_optimization_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., manager, operator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the maintenance record is for */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the traffic signal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic signal reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic signal (e.g., red, green, yellow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)
